site.name: Coloring Pages
site.description: Free printable coloring pages for kids. Animals, cars, dinosaurs, space, jobs, buildings and 10 more categories. Over 100 pages to download and print, no registration needed.

hero.eyebrow: Over 100 free coloring pages for kids aged 4–8
hero.heading: Find your favourite coloring page.
hero.text: Animals, dinosaurs, space, jobs and 10 more categories. Download and print for free, no registration.

home.categoriesHeading: What do you want to color today?

browseAll.heading: All Coloring Pages
browseAll.countSuffix: to download and print for free.
browseAll.metaDescription: Browse all free coloring pages to download and print. Animals, cars, dinosaurs, space and 10 more categories for kids.

category.pagesHeading: Click a coloring page to print or download

coloring.downloadFreeLabel: Download and print, no registration needed.

notFound.heading: This coloring page got lost.

flower-crown-01.description: A detailed flower crown with daisies, roses and lavender woven with ribbons.

shooting-star-01.title: Shooting Star
shooting-star-01.description: A shooting star across a night sky with a child on a hilltop making a wish.

jupiter-01.title: Jupiter
jupiter-01.description: Planet Jupiter with swirling cloud bands, the Great Red Spot and its moons.

black-hole-01.title: Black Hole
black-hole-01.description: A dramatic black hole with a glowing accretion disk and distorted stars.

space-colony-01.title: Space Colony
space-colony-01.description: A detailed space colony on a moon with domes, vehicles and astronauts.

baby-dino-01.title: Baby Dinosaur
baby-dino-01.description: A cute baby dinosaur that has just hatched, sitting next to its cracked eggshell.

plesiosaurus-01.title: Plesiosaurus
plesiosaurus-01.description: A friendly Plesiosaurus with a very long neck swimming in a prehistoric ocean.

dino-fight-01.title: Dinosaur Showdown
dino-fight-01.description: A dramatic face-off between a T-Rex and a Triceratops in a prehistoric clearing.

prehistoric-scene-01.title: Prehistoric Landscape
prehistoric-scene-01.description: A detailed prehistoric panorama with Brachiosaurus, Triceratops and a volcano.

clownfish-01.title: Clownfish
clownfish-01.description: A cute clownfish peeking from a sea anemone with bubbles and coral around.

starfish-01.title: Starfish
starfish-01.description: A friendly starfish on a sandy ocean floor with seashells and tiny crabs.

submarine-01.title: Submarine
submarine-01.description: A detailed yellow submarine with portholes and fish swimming alongside.

ocean-storm-01.title: Ocean Storm
ocean-storm-01.description: A dramatic storm with crashing waves, a lighthouse beam, lightning and a small boat.

magic-lamp-01.title: Magic Lamp
magic-lamp-01.description: A magic lamp with a friendly genie emerging from smoke with sparkles around.

flying-carpet-01.title: Flying Carpet
flying-carpet-01.description: A magic carpet flying through a starry Arabian night sky with two children riding it.

giant-01.title: Giant
giant-01.description: A friendly giant so tall his head is above the clouds, smiling at a tiny village below.

enchanted-castle-01.title: Enchanted Castle
enchanted-castle-01.description: A dramatic enchanted castle covered in magical vines, glowing flowers and orbs of light.

sandwich-01.title: Sandwich
sandwich-01.description: A tall stacked club sandwich with lettuce, tomato, cheese and crisps on the side.

popcorn-01.title: Popcorn
popcorn-01.description: A big striped cinema popcorn bucket overflowing with fluffy popcorn pieces.

feast-table-01.title: Feast Table
feast-table-01.description: A grand feast table with many dishes — roast, pies, fruits, candles and flowers.

candy-store-01.title: Candy Store
candy-store-01.description: A detailed candy store with jars of sweets, lollipop trees and a child choosing treats.

running-01.title: Running
running-01.description: A child running a race on a track towards a finish line ribbon with spectators cheering.

long-jump-01.title: Long Jump
long-jump-01.description: A child leaping through the air from a take-off board into a sand pit.

climbing-01.title: Rock Climbing
climbing-01.description: A detailed rock climber scaling a cliff face with helmet, harness and ropes.

surfing-01.title: Surfing
surfing-01.description: A surfer riding a large ocean wave on a surfboard with arms outstretched.

barn-01.title: Barn
barn-01.description: A classic red barn with a weather vane, hay bale, tractor and farm animals peeking out.

cottage-01.title: Fairy Tale Cottage
cottage-01.description: A cosy cottage with a thatched roof, chimney smoke, flower boxes and a garden well.

skyscraper-01.title: Skyscraper
skyscraper-01.description: A very tall glass skyscraper with many floors, a revolving entrance and people below.

pagoda-01.title: Pagoda
pagoda-01.description: A detailed Asian pagoda with curved tiered roofs, lanterns, cherry trees and a koi pond.

party-dress-01.title: Party Dress
party-dress-01.description: A colourful party dress with a puffy skirt, bow, frills and polka dots on a mannequin.

boots-collection-01.title: Boot Collection
boots-collection-01.description: A collection of different boots — cowboy, rain, snow, ankle and ballet flats.

knight-armor-01.title: Knight Armour
knight-armor-01.description: Detailed medieval knight armour with a full helmet, chest plate, sword and shield.

viking-costume-01.title: Viking Costume
viking-costume-01.description: A detailed Viking costume with a horned helmet, chainmail, shield and battle axe.

postman-01.title: Postman
postman-01.description: A friendly postman delivering a letter with a mail bag and a red bicycle nearby.

gardener-01.title: Gardener
gardener-01.description: A cheerful gardener in a sun hat tending to flowers with a watering can and wheelbarrow.

architect-01.title: Architect
architect-01.description: An architect at a drafting table with blueprints, a pencil and a scale model building.

astronomer-01.title: Astronomer
astronomer-01.description: An astronomer at a telescope in an observatory dome with star charts at night.
